channel.title: Honest Review on Charlotte's AI Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Honest Review on Charlotte's AI Lab

item.title: One Month with My AI Agent: The Honest Review Nobody Else Is Giving You
item.description: Output tripled. Search traffic went from 0% to 68%. One afternoon burned $200. A month with OpenClaw — what it actually changed, what it can’t do, and three things that are wildly overhyped. Five real tips for anyone thinking about trying it.
